data.title: Bitcoin Crosses $100,000 — This Trader Predicted It At The $16,000 Bottom In November 2022
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has crossed the $100,000 mark for the first time, validating a prominent trader’s prediction from late 2022 that BTC would rally $100,000 from its bottom of $16,000.
